title: A Horse with No Name
why_this_song: A Horse with No Name by America (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I've been through the desert on a horse with no name"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "La, la, la lala la la la, la, la"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "There were plants and birds and rocks and things"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I've been through the desert on a horse with no name"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I've been through the desert on a horse with no name"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: There was sand and hills and rings
The first thing I met was a fly with a buzz
And the sky with no clouds
The heat was hot and the ground was dry
I've been through the desert on a horse with no name
It felt good to be out of the rain
In the desert you can remember your name

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "desert" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "desert" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lala" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lala" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: On the first part of the journey
In the desert you can remember your name
Made me sad to think it was dead

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I was looking at all the life
After three days in the desert fun
'Cause the desert had turned to sea

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "A Horse with No Name" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "A Horse with No Name" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "A Horse with No Name", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "A Horse with No Name", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "A Horse with No Name" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "A Horse with No Name" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
